global.title: If you still want that 30% solar tax credit, the new panic date is July 4
global.summary: The Trump Administration’s decision to repeal of the 30% home solar tax credit in 2025 looked like the end of the road for subsidized residential rooftop solar projects, but homeowners can still get it under certain circumstances – until America’s 250th birthday, that is. more…

global.title: With 100 JCB e-machines on-hand, this UK rental fleet makes it EZ to go EV
global.summary: An equipment rental company in the UK is making it easier than ever for construction and groundskeeping crews to test out electric equipment options by adding more than 100 electric machines from JCB to its Leicestershire rental fleet. more…

global.title: Kia launches a ‘full-scale attack’ as its first EV storms into Japan’s forbidden land
global.summary: Kia officially entered the forbidden land after launching its first EV in Japan. The PV5 will spearhead Kia’s “full-scale attack” on the Japanese market as it looks to take on Toyota, Honda, and Nissan on their home turf. more…

global.title: Volkswagen is about to reveal the first electric GTI
global.summary: After five decades, Volkswagen confirmed the first electric GTI, the ID. Polo GTI will make its debut on Friday, May 15. more…

global.title: Bluetti 3,014Wh Elite 300 power station offers from exclusive $1,011 low, Segway F3 e-scooter + accessory credit $750, Jackery, more
global.summary: Our mid-week Green Deals are jam-packed with tons of lows, some short-term promotions, exclusive savings, and more. Leading the list is Bluetti’s latest Elite 300 3,014Wh Portable Power Station and bundles at exclusive lows starting from $1,011. We also noticed Segway offering its F3 Electric Scoote

global.title: Toyota launches the bZ4X Touring, its most powerful non-GR vehicle with 367 miles range
global.summary: The all-electric bZ4X Touring, sold as the bZ Woodland in the US, is Toyota’s most powerful vehicle without a GR badge. It’s also the fastest Toyota EV yet. more…

global.title: Data centers are cutting power to homes, driving homeowners to solar and batteries
global.summary: A Nevada utility just told 49,000 Lake Tahoe residents that it’s redirecting 75% of their electricity supply to data centers — and they have less than a year to find a new power source. It’s one of the starkest examples yet of the AI boom’s impact on everyday Americans. The case is extreme, but the

global.title: Volkswagen delays the Golf EV again — Will we ever see it launch?
global.summary: The all-electric Golf will not arrive in 2028 as expected. After another delay, here’s when you can expect to see the Volkswagen Golf EV now. more…

global.title: Waymo expands robotaxi coverage more than 20% — larger than Rhode Island
global.summary: Waymo announced a major expansion of its autonomous robotaxi service area, growing to over 1,400 square miles across 11 US cities. That’s an estimated 27% increase from its previous coverage and more territory than the entire state of Rhode Island. The expansion starts in Miami, with Austin, Atlanta

global.title: BYD eyes Stellantis EU plant takeover as EV demand spikes, confirms ‘other companies too’
global.summary: BYD wants to take over underutilized plants in Europe from legacy automakers to fuel its aggressive overseas expansion. Executive vice president Stella Li confirmed that BYD is holding discussions not only with Stellantis but also with “other companies too.” more…
